posts.author: ha_the_meow
posts.community: Modison LTD - Can the switchgear company switch fortunes?
posts.text: Global electrical contacts market valued at $4.8 billion in 2025 .Expected to reach $8.1 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 5.9% from 2026 to 2034 (From a report ). Major companies which make switchgears (ABB, Siemens, GE, Schneider Electric, and Eaton) collectively hold 42.5% market share in 2025 many of whom are customers of Modison. Also, these contacts are critical components and undergo stringent testing and auditing before going into production. Once a component supplier is designed-in and approved by a switchgear OEM, the switching costs are exceptionally high due to product liability risks a…
